headline: Stop gaining, start losing—today matters now
summary: You're gaining when you should lose; today eat only Huel portions, zero snacking, and row hard to reverse this momentum immediately.
details: Stick strictly to Huel pre-portioned meals today—no exceptions, no emotional snacking, no portion overages. Get 35 minutes on the rowing machine today; you need hard deficit-creating movement daily, not once a week. Today is your reset before Friday hits; one disciplined day chains into a week that actually moves the needle on your -0.70 kg/week requirement.
